facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 119 reviews. One dish on the menu that matters.

Cua 350 at 38 Đ. 30 Tháng 4 is where locals go for crab noodle soup done right. Bowl arrives loaded. Broth is rich, crabmeat is real, price won't hurt.

Most tourists eat at the resort. The ones who find this place talk about it for weeks.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the crab go in. That broth color tells you everything. Cua 350 on Đ. 30 Tháng 4, 4.9 stars and 119 people aren't exaggerating. This bowl is the move.

Cua 350, Đ. 30 Tháng 4. Go hungry.
